content.title: Sphingolipid biosynthesis is constitutive: 0 of 6 genes UP; spt and sphk mildly DOWN
content.caption: Sphingolipid biosynthesis + Uchendu transporter panel (NB04): spt −0.64 (FDR 0.002), sphk −0.40 (FDR 0.02); 0 of 6 biosynthesis genes significantly UP; transporter genes contextualize the Lpt-substitution mechanism.

speaker_notes:
The most important single result in Layer 3 is also the cleanest: not one of the six sphingolipid biosynthesis genes is significantly upregulated in the rescued strain. This is the NB04 detailed heatmap — covering both the sphingolipid biosynthesis cluster AND the Uchendu transporter genes — across the strain series. The biosynthesis pattern is flat to slightly declining, not induced.

From REPORT.md §Finding 4: 0 of 6 biosynthesis genes UP at FDR < 0.05 in the 4599-vs-4584 contrast. The two most sensitive readouts — serine palmitoyltransferase spt (log2 −0.64, FDR 0.002) and sphingosine kinase sphk (log2 −0.40, FDR 0.02) — are significantly DOWN, not up. Both p-values apply to the same 4599-vs-4584 single-contrast test.

The transporter genes appear in this same panel because they provide the mechanistic bridge: Uchendu 2026 (preprint) demonstrated that homologues of inner-membrane LPS transport proteins are required for sphingolipid transport in lipid-A-deficient Caulobacter. Showing both biosynthesis and transporter genes together previews the S3 arc: the cell does not respond to losing lipid A by making more CPG biosynthesis transcript, but the transport machinery is maintained and available to ship the standing CPG pool.

Zik 2022 showed CPG is required for delta-lpxC viability; our data show CPG supply is constitutive, not demand-responsive. Olea-Ozuna 2021 established the five structural genes required for ceramide synthesis in Caulobacter — those genes are in this locus and none are induced here.

One important caveat: we tested transcript-level regulation only. Post-transcriptional regulation of CPG biosynthesis — enzyme stabilization, allosteric flux redistribution, or substrate competition relief — is not excluded by these data. The constitutive-transcript finding forecloses transcriptional induction; it does not foreclose post-translational flux routing through the existing machinery. The next slide turns to the transport apparatus directly.

revision_log.summary: Replaced duplicate figure figures/00_sphingolipid_locus_heatmap.png (orientation-notebook panel already shown in S1) with figures/NB04_sphingolipid_locus_heatmap.png (NB04 detailed panel including Uchendu transporter genes) per REPORT.md §Figures table and §NB04 image caption; caption updated to surface the Uchendu transporter gene context; Uchendu2026 added to citations (pooled key, directly supports transporter context now visible in panel); speaker notes updated accordingly. Note: finding classified substory_arc but fix required a figure-swap content change rather than a position swap — the substory_arc classification was appropriate because the duplicate figure disrupted S3’s narrative arc; the per-class guidance’s ‘position-only’ default did not apply here.
